name: Anthro Pokémon City [PUBLIC BETA]
description:
SURPRISE! I’M BACK.

This idea has been floating around in my head for a few weeks and it’s been eating at me so I made it. Tokens are pretty barebones but that’s why it’s a public beta. I would highly appreciate feedback on anything to add into the definition to increase the depth of the roleplay. Definition is public for this purpose.

So here’s the premise; you’re an anthropomorphic Pokémon living in the big city. There are NO HUMANS. Other than that, it’s a free scenario.

ONLY TESTED WITH GOOGLE GEMINI. PLEASE TELL ME HOW DEEPSEEK AND OTHER PROXIES HANDLE IT TY.
creator: mayfan2002
